Tt) - ftIr 4cti(--414 3117fkil MN ath* 31t9T" 79 (144, e44I1q, fitff* [freprff-111/4/139w13/anni ;469 (1112013 -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY PARy III SEC. 41 3141 uirf ftzfl wdrtfw grrdizt fa"+"Ri fRt7(W-4.18c1 A, VS i"d"*"(FftW 31l41914,1989 ( 1989 5T 39) MU 52 WI314-44M (I ) TITSI dal( 1th-11:1i* ("RMITMT) irfi-BRI, 2000 RPV4.4 14( i ) *TM *4 4144* 13 Tri, 2013 q4 airzir-4ft 3114 163t at 4 watt wg salt fIH(1.th (141441011) fai-N44, 2013 al /WIT fth-cIrt I ii tiiviuiI. ti wp.rfPTfka Tc1/4-111T1 SMALL INDUSTRIES DEVELOPMENT BANK OF INDIA NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th August, 2013 Small Industries Development Bank of India (General)Amendment Regulations, 2913 F. No. 2084/CAV.—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and (2) of section 52 of the Small Industries Development Bank of IndiaAct, 1989(39 of 1989), read with Regulation 14(i) of the Small Industries Development Bank of India (General) Regulations, 2000, the Board of Directors of Small Industries Development Bank of India has made the following amendments to the Small Industries Development Bank of India (General) Regulations, 2000 (the Principal Regulations), namely:- These Regulations may be called Small Industries Development Bank of India (General) Amendment Regulations. 2013. The amendment shall be effective from May 13,2013. (a) SCHEDULE-I In the format of the Balance Sheet as appearing in the SCHEDULE-I to the Principal Regulations a iiew sub-head "(c) Other Reserves (Please specify)" shall be inserted to the following effect after sub-head (b) and helbre the head -(B) Surplus in Profit and Loss Account" under the head "CAPITAL AND LIABILITIES" .in "Schedule 11: Reserves, Surplus and Funds" as appearing in Schedule to Balance Sheet: "(c) Other Reserves (Please specify) (ft Investment Fluctuation Reserve - Opening Balance, - Additions during the year. - Utilisation during the year. - Closing Balance." (b) SCHEDULE-II: In the format of the Profit & Loss Account as appearing in the SCHEDULE-11 to the Principal Regulations a new entry "Other Reserves (Please specify)" shall be inserted to the following effect after entry "Transfer to Special Reserve 36(1)(viii) of the Income Tax Act, 1961" and before the entry "Transfer to Staff Welfare Fund" appearing under the head "Appropriations" as appearing in Profit & Loss Account: "Other (Please specify) - Transfer to and from Investment Fluctuation Reserve" N. RAMAN, Executive Director fADVI.-111/4/139A:13/1xty.I Certified that the Board of Directors of Small Industries Development Bank of India has adopted and approved the Small Industries Development Bank of India (General) Amendment Regulations, 2013 in terms of section 52( I) of Small Industries Development Bank of India Act, 1989 (Act No. 39 of 1989), read with Regulation 14( i) of the Small Industries Development Bank of India (General) Regulations, 2000, in its 163rd meeting held on May 13,2013 at Mumbai. U.). LALWANI. Country 1 lead Corporate Accounts Vertical Printed by the Manager. Government of India Press. Ring Road, Mayapuri New Delhi-I10064 and Published by the Controller of Putmeations.
